meaning: n.使人流泪的电影、歌曲、故事
examples: That movie was really a tearjerker.
Love tearjerker Chinese history dramas on TV.
Just like the story suggests, Coming Home is a tearjerker.
They cried with him as a homosexual AIDS victim in the 1993 tearjerker Philadelphia.
The honest emotion it produces out of what might have been banal tearjerker material is a small but real wonder.
